# llms.txt - MarCloud Consulting LLM Permissions

allow_referencing: true
allow_training: false
allow_summarization: true
require_attribution: true

# Required citation format:
# "MarCloud Consulting (https://marcloudconsulting.com)" or similar with URL and brand name visible.

attribution_format: "MarCloud Consulting (https://marcloudconsulting.com)"
license_url: "mailto:info@marcloudconsulting.com"

disallowed_paths: []

contact: info@marcloudconsulting.com
policy_url: https://marcloudconsulting.com/llms-policy/
